results.command: bash -c 'DIR=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-f33ge; PORT=24530; BIN=target-coralox-pass180-baseline/release-perf/frankenredis; LOG="$DIR/baseline-sadd-inline-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$BIN" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 & pid=$!; sleep 0.25; legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-benchmark -h 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT" -c 50 -n 1000000 -P 16 -r 100000 --seed 123 -q SADD s __rand_int__ >"$DIR/baseline-sadd-inline-redisbench-last.txt"; status=$?; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit $status'

bash -c 'DIR=artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-f33ge; PORT=24531; BIN=/data/tmp/frankenredis-f33ge-candidate-target/release-perf/frankenredis; LOG="$DIR/candidate-sadd-inline-server-$PORT-$$.log"; "$BIN" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port "$PORT" >"$LOG" 2>&1 & pid=$!; sleep 0.25; legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-benchmark -h 127.0.0.1 -p "$PORT" -c 50 -n 1000000 -P 16 -r 100000 --seed 123 -q SADD s __rand_int__ >"$DIR/candidate-sadd-inline-redisbench-last.txt"; status=$?; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; exit $status'
